2606.30388.title: A Stochastic--Geometric Theory of Scaling Laws in Grokking
2606.30388.paper_summary: Delayed generalization (\ie~grokking) refers to the phenomenon in which a neural network fits its training data early in training but only begins to generalize after a prolonged delay, often through an abrupt transition. Despite extensive empirical study, its underlying mechanism remains poorly understood. In this work, we first theoretically characterize a shell--core topological configuration of the reachable solution space induced by Adam's optimization dynamics with weight-shrinkage regularization, supported by empirical evidence. This optimization-induced topological configuration gives rise to grokking. In model's parameter space, random initialization solutions concentrate on a thin outer spherical shell, enclosing another spherical shell of memorization solutions, which in turn contains a core corresponding to the generalization solutions. Leveraging stopping-time theory, we then analyze the geometry of this topological configuration and the solution transition time at which optimization trajectories escape the memorization manifold and first reach the boundary of the generalization manifold. Our theoretical analysis derives grokking scaling laws for the learning rate, batch size, and $\ell_2$ regularization coefficient, which are further validated through experiments and shown to recover results from prior literature.
2606.30388.paper_summary_zh: 延遲泛化（即~grokking）是指一種現象，在此現象中，神經網絡在訓練早期適應其訓練數據，但通常在經過一段時間的延遲後才開始泛化，這一過程往往伴隨著突變。儘管已有大量實證研究，但其潛在機制仍然不甚明瞭。在本研究中，我們首先理論上描述了由於Adam的優化動力學和權重縮減正則化所引起的可達解空間的殼-核拓撲配置，並得到了實證支持。這種由優化引起的拓撲配置促成了grokking。在模型的參數空間中，隨機初始化的解集中在一個薄的外圓球殼上，包圍著另一個記憶解的圓球殼，而這又包含了一個對應於泛化解的核心。利用停時理論，我們分析了這一拓撲配置的幾何形狀以及優化軌跡逃離記憶流形並首次到達泛化流形邊界的解轉換時間。我們的理論分析推導出了學習率、批次大小和$\ell_2$正則化係數的grokking縮放定律，這些定律進一步通過實驗得到了驗證，並顯示出能夠恢復先前文獻中的結果。
2606.30388.author: Róisín Luo et.al.
2606.30388.authors: Róisín Luo, Christian Gagné, Jonas Ngnawé, Ihsan Ullah, Karyn Morrissey
